compiled_state.title: Add hallucination verification checklist to standard and deep reviewer agents
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Add hallucination verification instructions to reviewer agent files:
1. plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md — Add checklist section: External Reference Verification. For each external API call, model name, or library function in the diff: (a) verify it exists via Grep/Read in the repo for internal APIs, (b) verify via import source for external libraries. Flag unverifiable references as fragile (high confidence it does not exist) or important (moderate confidence).
2. plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-deep-correctness.md — Same checklist.
3. plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md — Update schema example to include fragile as a valid severity alongside critical, important, minor. Add note distinguishing internal vs external API verification.
4. Clearly distinguish: internal APIs (verify via Grep in repo) vs external library APIs (verify via import or documentation).

Unit test exemption: Agent prompt/guidance files with no conditional logic.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md (modify)
- plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-deep-correctness.md (modify)
- plugins/dso/docs/workflows/prompts/reviewer-base.md (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Standard reviewer contains hallucination verification
  Verify: grep -qi 'hallucin\|external.*reference.*verif\|verify.*exist' plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-standard.md
- [ ] Deep correctness reviewer contains hallucination verification
  Verify: grep -qi 'hallucin\|external.*reference.*verif\|verify.*exist' plugins/dso/agents/code-reviewer-deep-correctness.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Changes verified ✓ — acceptance criteria pass, fragile severity in schema
comments.author: Test
